<think> I'm thinking of the Moran family, a notorious Australian crime family based in Melbourne. I'm trying to recall a notable incident involving a member of the family being shot. I'm recalling that Lewis Moran was a key figure in the family and was known for his involvement in organized crime. I'm thinking that he was shot outside his home in Aberfeldie in 1994. This incident was a significant event in Australian crime history and was widely reported in the media.</think>
<answer> Lewis Moran </answer>
